title: Kureha Accepts Hiriluk’s Will
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on kureha accepts hiriluk’s will, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Kureha Accepts Hiriluk’s Will. Chopper’s grief meets Kureha’s harsh compassion as Hiriluk’s dream becomes a will that Chopper must carry forward. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi sh

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: But now I don't need to hold back anymore--!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: How dare you treat King Wapol of Drum with such disrespect and brutality!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's right! Don't you realize you're in the presence of royalty!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This island and the lives of its inhabitants are subject to the very whims of his regal self!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: King?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: So what!? All I know is that you guys annoy the hell outta me.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You know those three, kid?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: oh I know them alright. They're the "pesty pirate posse."

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: nothing but pests, the lot of'em.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: They even tried to eat my ship!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Well, I'm not gonna take their crap anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: More importantly, aren't you cold with just that on?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Ah-

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Did they just say "K/NG!?" I thought they were pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You just realized that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Fool... It seems you've only now realized the folly of your actions.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But that is how it is. The man before you is none other than the rightful master of drum cast-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Holy cow, it's cold!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah, I know!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's minus 50°C.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They're ignoring us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Arghhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Your majesty!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Mahaha... Maha Haha.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Strawhat...! You've ticked me off big time... I swear I'll devour every last piece of you now...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Uhhh, might want to save the tough-talk. He's gone back inside to get a jacket.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's not here!?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: If you don't mind me asking...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Did he... stretch just now...?

summary: This part highlights kureha accepts hiriluk’s will and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
